title: Emitters: JSON dictionary + Frictionless Table Schema + Croissant
context: The canonical dictionary model (model-001) must project to interoperable outputs so delivered dictionaries are machine-usable. This task builds emitters from canonical JSON to Frictionless Table Schema and Croissant ML, with versions pinned. Tooling only; it never mirrors or hosts data.
objective: Implement emitters that turn a canonical JSON dictionary into a valid Frictionless Table Schema and a valid Croissant ML v1.0 document, with golden fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Emits canonical JSON -> valid Frictionless Table Schema + Croissant ML v1.0 (pinned in specVersions).
Golden input->output fixtures diffed in CI; outputs validated against pinned specs.
Code MIT; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; DCO signed-off.
output: PR to the repo adding the emitters package/module plus golden fixtures and CI wiring.
